testcase.name: labels each variant
no edits returns the original text
applies edits in descending order, preserving surrounding text
reads string name or undefined
reads the key of a string-named property
value-span offsets land on the quoted version literal
empty / non-object / array roots yield no entries
sentinels collected only with resolveSentinels
non-string/identifier/numeric keys do not throw and are ignored
collects catalog, named catalogs (nested + top-level) and dep fields
object form without `packages` -> []
non-array/non-object workspaces -> []
absent workspaces / non-object root -> []
array form
negation + multi-glob preserved verbatim
object form reads `packages`
maps with a concurrency limit, preserving order
boolean + value flags
defaults
`-r` is a recursive flag, not a positional file
unknown flag throws
positional file is absolute-resolved
most-permissive wins
drops the root package.json itself
no matches -> []
expands `*` globs, skipping dirs without a package.json
handles literal member paths
honors `!` negation
dedupes overlapping globs and returns absolute paths
array-form: rewrites workspaces to a sorted catalog, unifies conflicts, rewrites members
does not duplicate a catalog entry that already exists
is idempotent: an already-catalogued workspace is a no-op
object-form with an empty catalog populates it
a fetch failure leaves that dependency untouched and uncatalogued
errors when the target is not a workspace
runs a single install at the root after migrating when --install is set
object-form with an existing catalog merges only missing entries
--dry-run writes nothing
object-form without a catalog inserts one
runs a single install at the root when changes are written
a non-zero install exit is surfaced as installExitCode
--only filters which packages are fetched and bumped
recursively bumps members, dedupes fetches, skips internal/protocol/sentinel
reports nothing to do when no bumpable entries exist
--dry-run writes nothing and never spawns install
propagates a non-zero install exit code
parses argv, runs (dry-run) and returns 0
returns 1 when the target file is missing
runToCatalog: an already-catalog tree logs "Nothing to convert"
runUpdate: a real write run logs "Running bun install…" and installs
runUpdate: a fetch failure prints ✗ to warn; others still bump to log
runUpdate: empty plan prints "No bumpable entries" and fetches nothing
main: a missing file prints "Not found:" to error and returns 1
runToCatalog: logs "+ catalog ·" rows + summary, "!" conflicts to warn
runUpdate: header, per-bump line, and summary go to log; nothing to warn/error
200 returns version and encodes scoped names with %2F
404 throws with status
rejects bodies without a string version (dynamic per-call queue)
bumpRange preserves prefix; equal range is a no-op
splits every prefix form
detectIndentUnit
formatJsonArray
formatJsonObject
plain semver (incl. partial-x) is bumpable
protocol specifiers are never bumpable
sentinels are skipped by default, bumpable with --resolve-sentinels
no workspaces -> root only
non-recursive -> root only
recursive array-form -> root + members, each with its own entries
labels each variant

drops the root package.json itself
dedupes overlapping globs and returns absolute paths

a non-zero install exit is surfaced as installExitCode

recursively bumps members, dedupes fetches, skips internal/protocol/sentinel
reports nothing to do when no bumpable entries exist
--dry-run writes nothing and never spawns install
propagates a non-zero install exit code
parses argv, runs (dry-run) and returns 0
returns 1 when the target file is missing

runUpdate: a real write run logs "Running bun install…" and installs

runUpdate: empty plan prints "No bumpable entries" and fetches nothing

rejects bodies without a string version (dynamic per-call queue)
bumpRange preserves prefix; equal range is a no-op
splits every prefix form

formatJsonArray

protocol specifiers are never bumpable
sentinels are skipped by default, bumpable with --resolve-sentinels
no workspaces -> root only
non-recursive -> root only
recursive array-form -> root + members, each with its own entries

formatJsonArray
formatJsonObject
plain semver (incl. partial-x) is bumpable
protocol specifiers are never bumpable
sentinels are skipped by default, bumpable with --resolve-sentinels
no workspaces -> root only
non-recursive -> root only
recursive array-form -> root + members, each with its own entries
